subject: english
description: 様態（well, fast）・時（yesterday）・場所（here）を表す副詞は、通常文末に置きます。

questions.question: I play games ___. (well)
questions.explanation: 様態を表す副詞は文末に置きます

questions.question: She plays ___. (beautifully)
questions.explanation: 様態を表す副詞は文末に置きます

questions.question: I played games ___. (yesterday)
questions.explanation: 時を表す副詞は文末に置きます

questions.question: I play games ___. (here)
questions.explanation: 場所を表す副詞は文末に置きます

questions.question: He runs ___. (fast)
questions.explanation: fast は形容詞・副詞ともに fast（fastly は間違い）

questions.question: She studies ___. (hard)
questions.explanation: hard は副詞もそのまま hard（hardly は「ほとんど〜ない」の意味になるので注意）

questions.question: I will play games ___. (tomorrow)
questions.explanation: 時を表す副詞は文末に置きます

questions.question: She sings ___. (loudly)
questions.explanation: 様態を表す副詞は形容詞 + ly で作ります

questions.question: I play games ___. (somewhere/どこかで)
questions.explanation: 「どこかで」を表す場所の副詞は somewhere を使います

questions.question: He speaks English ___. (fluently)
questions.explanation: 様態を表す副詞は形容詞 + ly で作ります
